channel.title: Washington County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Domain is .com (not .gov/.org) — verified genuine. Sitewide WordPress /feed/ exists but is not probate-specific. Dedicated forms page with five categorized form groups. KNOWN ISSUE: washingtoncountymaine.com has been returning HTTP 403 to this bot's requests (likely WAF bot-blocking) since mid-2026; kept enabled so the status dashboard surfaces it and it recovers automatically if the block is lifted. [STALE: source last verified 2026-07-05T10:23:53.530936+00:00; 60 consecutive fetch failures since — items below may be out of date.]

item.title: Monitoring started: Washington County Probate Court
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
